meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by building professional user onboarding flows. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends when you build functional, high-impact features. User onboarding is the perfect project: it demonstrates UI/UX mastery, database state management, and user psychology. By building a polished onboarding flow, you prove you can solve real-world problems that businesses actually pay for.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank GitHub repository, the cursor blinking in a rhythmic taunt. Every job posting demands 'proven experience,' yet you have nothing to show but theoretical tutorials and unfinished exercises. The industry feels like an impenetrable fortress, and you are standing outside without a key.

But here is the secret: you don't need a decade of experience; you need a single, polished feature that screams 'I am a builder.' User onboarding is the high-stakes gateway of every SaaS application. Mastering it transforms you from a student who knows syntax into a developer who understands product value.

steps.title: Architect the User Journey
steps.description: Define the critical path from signup to the 'Aha!' moment. Map out the database schema needed to track onboarding progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a multi-step user onboarding flow including current_step, progress_percentage, and user_preferences.

steps.title: Build the Interactive UI
steps.description: Develop a sleek, responsive stepper component that handles state transitions without page reloads.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React stepper component with Framer Motion transitions that saves progress to the backend on every click.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the user can leave and return to their onboarding flow exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a hook that syncs local onboarding state to a database and handles optimistic UI updates for a seamless experience.

steps.title: Add Context-Aware AI Guidance
steps.description: Integrate a small AI helper that provides personalized tips based on the user's input during onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an AI service function that takes user profile data and returns a personalized welcome message string.

steps.title: Stress Test and Refine
steps.description: Use Claude Code to simulate edge cases, such as network failures during form submissions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the onboarding flow covering success, failure, and interrupted states.

pro_tips: Always use a 'Save & Exit' button to reduce user friction; it shows you care about retention metrics.
Never hardcode onboarding steps; store them in a JSON config file so the flow can be updated without redeploying.
Implement 'Optimistic UI' updates so the app feels instant, even when the database call is slow.
Add a 'Skip' option that defaults to a sensible baseline; forcing users through long flows is a conversion killer.
Log every onboarding step completion to an analytics dashboard; this data is pure gold for your portfolio presentation.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the 'Aha!' moment and add it to your LinkedIn profile. Then, tackle the 'Dashboard' view next.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an engineer with a functional, production-grade feature in your portfolio. The gap between you and your first job is just a few lines of code away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
